title: Alan Turing
ground_truth_corrupted_sentence: Turing is widely considered to be the father of computer engineering.
guessed_corrupted_sentence: Turing is widely considered to be the father of computer engineering.

parsed_response.corrupted_sentence: Turing is widely considered to be the father of computer engineering.
parsed_response.explanation: In the standard Wikipedia lede, Turing is described as the father of theoretical computer science and artificial intelligence, not of computer engineering. The rest of the passage aligns with well-documented facts from his biography.
